page_content:
CCJS600 Criminal Justice (3 Credits)

Current concept of criminal justice in relationship to other concepts

in the field. Historical perspective. Criminal justice and social control. Operational implications. Systemic aspects. Issues of evaluation. Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Criminology and Criminal Justice (Master's); Criminology and Criminal Justice (Doctoral)) ; or permission of BSOS-Criminology & Criminal Justice department. Formerly: CJUS600.
